name: Cherry Trifle
recipeIngredient: 2 cups skim milk, at room temperature
10 ozs low-fat pound cake, thawed and thinly sliced
1/4 cup orange juice, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the vanilla pudding with milk according to package directions.
2. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Brush the cake slices with orange juice.
4. Line the bottom and sides of a 2-quart glass bowl with cake slices.
5. Layer half vanilla pudding, one-third cherry pie filling, half cup whipped topping, and half cake slices.
6. Repeat layers.
7. Spread remaining whipped topping over all.
8. Spoon cherry pie filling into the center, leaving a 1-inch border.
9. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
